title: microrrhinum litorale
intro: Microrrhinum litorale, also known as Sea Sandwort, is a small, succulent plant native to coastal areas in Europe and Western Asia. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, including its ability to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues and skin irritations due to its anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Microrrhinum litorale include its potential to soothe respiratory issues such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as its ability to calm skin irritations like eczema and acne. Microrrhinum litorale is often prepared as a tea or infused oil, and its herbal preparations have been used topically to treat skin conditions and inhaled to alleviate respiratory issues.
